FileForge
ToolsAboutPrivacy

Privacy Policy

FileForge is designed from the ground up to protect your privacy. Here's exactly how we handle your data.

No data collection whatsoever

Your Files Stay On Your Device

FileForge processes all files locally in your browser. Your files are never uploaded to any server. We have no servers to receive your files. Everything happens right on your device.

No Tracking or Analytics

We don't use any analytics tools, tracking pixels, or monitoring services. We have no way to know who uses FileForge or how they use it. Your activity is completely private.

Local Storage Only

The only data we store is in your browser's LocalStorage: your theme preference, language preference, and processing history. This data never leaves your device.

No Cookies (Except Essential)

FileForge doesn't use tracking cookies or third-party cookies. The only cookie we might use is for storing your theme preference, which is strictly functional.

No Account Required

FileForge doesn't have user accounts. There's no signup, no login, and no personal information collected. You can use all features immediately and anonymously.

Questions About Privacy?

Since FileForge is open source, you can audit our code yourself to verify our privacy claims.

View Source Code

Privacy-first file processing toolkit. Your files stay on your device.
